segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: As you all know, the university is planning an arts festival for later this year, and here in the music department we've planned three concerts.
segments.zh: 大家都知道,学校今年晚些时候要举办一场艺术节,我们音乐系已经策划了三场音乐会。这些都是公开演出,节目单刚定下来。艺术节的主题是英国和澳大利亚之间的联系,这也体现在音乐上——每场音乐会都会同时呈现英国和澳大利亚作曲家的作品。我先简单介绍一下澳大利亚的音乐,因为大家大概不太熟悉。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: These will be public performances, and the programme has just been finalised.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The theme of the festival is links between the UK and Australia, and this is reflected in the music: each concert will feature both British and Australian composers.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: I'll tell you briefly about the Australian music, as you probably won't be familiar with that.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The first concert will include music by Liza Lim, who was born in Perth, Western Australia, in 1966.
segments.zh: 第一场音乐会将上演澳大利亚作曲家 Liza Lim 的音乐,她1966年出生于西澳大利亚州的珀斯。和很多小孩一样,Lim 起初学的是钢琴,同时还学了小提琴,但在她11岁时,老师们鼓励她开始作曲。她发现作曲才是自己真正的强项,后来在澳大利亚和其他一些国家学习并教授作曲。作为作曲家,她收到过多国管弦乐团、其他表演者和音乐节的委约创作。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: As a child, Lim originally learned to play the piano – like so many children – and also the violin, but when she was 11 her teachers encouraged her to start composing.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: She found this was her real strength, and she studied and later taught composition, both in Australia and in other countries.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: As a composer, she has received commissions from numerous orchestras, other performers and festivals in several countries.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Liza Lim's compositions are vibrant and full of energy, and she often explores Asian and Australian Aboriginal cultural sources, including the native instrument, the didgeridoo: this is featured in a work called The Compass.
segments.zh: Liza Lim 的作品充满活力和能量,她经常从亚洲和澳大利亚原住民文化中汲取灵感,包括他们的本土乐器——迪吉里杜管:她在一部名为《指南针》的作品中就用了这种乐器。她的音乐极富表现力,所以尽管作品复杂,却依然拥有打动听众和演奏者的力量。

words.def: 迪吉里杜管(澳洲原住民乐器)

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Her music is very expressive, so although it is complex, it has the power of connecting with audiences and performers alike.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: In the festival we're going to give a semi-staged performance of The Oresteia.
segments.zh: 艺术节上我们将半舞台呈现《俄瑞斯忒亚》这部作品。这是一部由七个部分组成的歌剧,取材于埃斯库罗斯的一部古希腊悲剧三部曲。Lim 在二十五六岁时创作了它,还和 Barrie Kosky 一起写了剧本。演出阵容包括六名歌手、一名舞者以及一支管弦乐队;乐队除了标准的管弦乐器外,还加入了电吉他和一件传统的土耳其弦乐器。Lim 写到,因为悲剧中的故事本身就不好讲述,她创作出的声音也带有不安感,包括呼吸、抽泣、笑声和口哨声。这部作品时长约75分钟,音乐会的其余部分将由英国作曲家 Ralph Vaughan Williams 和 Frederick Delius 的管弦乐作品构成。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: This is an opera in seven parts, based on a trilogy of ancient Greek tragedies by Aeschylus.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Lim composed this when she was in her mid-20s, and she also wrote the text, along with Barrie Kosky.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: It's performed by six singers, a dancer, and an orchestra that, as well as standard orchestral instruments, includes electric guitar, and a traditional Turkish stringed instrument.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Lim wrote that because the stories in the tragedies are not easy to tell, the sounds she creates are also disturbing, and they include breathing, sobbing, laughing and whistling.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The work lasts around 75 minutes, and the rest of the concert will consist of orchestral works by the British composers Ralph Vaughan Williams and Frederick Delius.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Moving on now to our second concert, this will begin with instrumental music by British composers – Benjamin Britten and Judith Weir.
segments.zh: 接下来说说第二场音乐会。开场是英国作曲家的器乐作品——Benjamin Britten 和 Judith Weir 的曲子。中场休息之后我们把目光转向澳大利亚,是 Ross Edwards 的作品《遥远之塔》(The Tower of Remoteness)。据 Edwards 说,这部作品的灵感来自大自然:他独自坐在一条干涸的小溪河床上,头顶是棕榈树叶的遮蔽,听着鸟鸣和虫声。《遥远之塔》是为钢琴和单簧管而作。Edwards 说,他写完这部作品多年后才意识到,自己是无意识地把开头的乐句仿照了一段鸟叫。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: After the interval we'll go to Australia for a piece by Ross Edwards: The Tower of Remoteness.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: According to Edwards, the inspiration for this piece came from nature, when he was sitting alone in the dry bed of a creek, overshadowed by the leaves of palm trees, listening to the birds and insects.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The Tower of Remoteness is scored for piano and clarinet.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Edwards says he realised years after writing the piece that he had subconsciously modelled its opening phrase on a bird call.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Ross Edwards was born in 1943 in Sydney, Australia, and studied at the Sydney Conservatorium of Music and the universities of Adelaide and Sydney.
segments.zh: Ross Edwards 于1943年出生在澳大利亚悉尼,曾就读于悉尼音乐学院,以及阿德莱德大学和悉尼大学。他在澳大利亚很有名气,事实上他是这个国家上演率最高的作曲家之一。他写过各种类型的音乐,从交响曲、协奏曲一直到专为儿童创作的作品。评论家说 Edwards 的音乐“与澳大利亚有着深厚的联系”,也可以看作是对澳大利亚引以为傲的多元文化的一种礼赞。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: He's well known in Australia, and in fact he's one of the country's most performed composers.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: He's written a wide range of music, from symphonies and concertos to some composed specifically for children.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Edwards's music has been described as being 'deeply connected to Australia', and it can be regarded as a celebration of the diversity of cultures that Australia can be proud of.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: The last of the three Australian composers to be represented in our festival is Carl Vine.
segments.zh: 艺术节呈现的三位澳大利亚作曲家中,最后一位是 Carl Vine。Vine 生于1954年,和 Liza Lim 一样也来自西澳大利亚州的珀斯。他五岁开始学短号,五年后改学钢琴。不过,他上大学最初读的是物理,后来才转到作曲专业。毕业后他搬到悉尼,以自由钢琴家兼作曲家的身份工作。没过多久,他就在澳大利亚以舞蹈作曲家的身份声名鹊起,事实上他为舞蹈作品创作过25首配乐。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Born in 1954, Vine, like Liza Lim, comes from Perth, Western Australia.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: He took up the cornet at the age of five, switching to the piano five years later.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: However, he went to university to study physics, before changing to composition.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: After graduating he moved to Sydney and worked as a freelance pianist and composer.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: Before long he had become prominent in Australia as a composer for dance, and in fact has written 25 scores of that type.

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: In our third concert, Vine will be represented by his music for the flag hand-over ceremony of the Olympics held in 1996.
segments.zh: 第三场音乐会上,呈现 Vine 的将是他为1996年奥运会会旗交接仪式创作的音乐。这部时长七分钟的管弦乐作品当年被全球数百万人听过,我们将把它和英国作曲家 Edward Elgar 以及更晚近的 Thomas Adès 的作品一起呈现。

segments.speaker: LECTURER
segments.en: This seven-minute orchestral piece was of course heard by millions of people worldwide, and we'll hear it alongside works written by British composers Edward Elgar and, more recently, Thomas Adès.

questions.title: Questions 31–40
instructions: Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.

items.prompt: studied piano and 31 ______ before turning to composition

pairs.note: studied 替换为 learned to play
原文直接出现 the violin,即 31 题答案
turning to composition = start composing,后者被鼓励开始

paraphrase.explain: 定位句 'learned to play the piano ... and also the violin, but when she was 11 her teachers encouraged her to start composing',其中 violin 就是空格答案。

items.prompt: compositions show a great deal of 32 ______ and are drawn from various cultural sources

pairs.note: show a great deal of X = full of X,两者都表示富含
原文 'full of energy',energy 直接命中空格

pairs.p: explores Asian and Australian Aboriginal cultural sources
pairs.note: drawn from = 从……中汲取,explores cultural sources 与之对应

paraphrase.explain: 定位句 'Liza Lim's compositions are vibrant and full of energy, and she often explores Asian and Australian Aboriginal cultural sources',其中 energy 就是答案。

items.prompt: her music is very expressive and also 33 ______

pairs.note: 题干与原文完全一致,便于定位
题干说'也很 33',原文用 although 承接说'尽管很复杂但依然有力量',复杂即答案

paraphrase.explain: 定位句 'Her music is very expressive, so although it is complex, it has the power ...',complex 直接对应 33 空格。

items.prompt: festival will include her 34 ______ called The Oresteia

pairs.note: 34 空对应原文 an opera,题干 will include her ... 对应原文 This is an opera
作品名 The Oresteia 一致,由前一句给出

paraphrase.explain: 上一句已给出 semi-staged performance of The Oresteia,紧接着的定位句 'This is an opera in seven parts, based on a trilogy of ancient Greek tragedies by Aeschylus',opera 就是 34 空答案。

items.prompt: Lim described the sounds in The Oresteia as 35 ______

pairs.note: described the sounds = the sounds she creates + wrote that,同义表达
原文 also disturbing,disturbing 是答案

paraphrase.explain: 定位句 'Lim wrote that ... the sounds she creates are also disturbing',disturbing 就是 35 题答案。

items.prompt: The Tower of Remoteness is performed by piano and 36 ______

pairs.q: The Tower of Remoteness is performed by
pairs.p: The Tower of Remoteness is scored for
pairs.note: performed by 与 scored for 都指配器/编制
piano and clarinet 与题干结构完全对应,clarinet 是答案

paraphrase.explain: 定位句 'The Tower of Remoteness is scored for piano and clarinet',clarinet 直接对应空格。

pairs.note: celebrates(动词)对应 a celebration of(名词短语)
题干的 cultural 37 对应原文 diversity of cultures,答案是 diversity

paraphrase.explain: 定位句 'it can be regarded as a celebration of the diversity of cultures that Australia can be proud of',diversity 就是 37 题答案。

pairs.note: physics 直接命中,是 38 题答案
studying music 与 changing to composition 同义,composition 属于 music

paraphrase.explain: 定位句 'he went to university to study physics, before changing to composition',physics 就是 38 题答案。

items.prompt: became well known as composer of music for 39 ______

pairs.p: had become prominent in Australia as a composer
pairs.note: well known 对应 prominent,均指知名
a composer for dance,dance 就是 39 题答案

paraphrase.explain: 定位句 'he had become prominent in Australia as a composer for dance',dance 直接对应 39 空格。

items.prompt: festival will include his music for the 1996 40 ______

pairs.p: his music for the flag hand-over ceremony of the Olympics held in 1996
pairs.note: his music for ... the Olympics ... in 1996,Olympics 直接命中
festival includes 由 our third concert 具体化

paraphrase.explain: 定位句 'In our third concert, Vine will be represented by his music for the flag hand-over ceremony of the Olympics held in 1996',Olympics 就是 40 题答案。
